violations.text: Observed the door to the outside, located in the front of establishment and door located inside bathroom to outside, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine/bleach) sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Provided PIC with proper wash, rinse and sanitizing procedures to sanitizing coffee pots. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

Observed the ceiling tiles in the back area is in poor repair. Some ceiling tiles observed with holes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per interview of PIC water from rain leaks into store above office area. Observed water pooled in front of cooler, no evidence the water is coming directly from cooler. PIC dried water during time of inspection. In addition, PIC showed new tiles awaiting installment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The warewashing area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

At the time of inspection, a 2 Bay sink was observed in a toilet room for manually washing/rinsing/sanitizing coffee pots. A sink with at least 3 compartments shall be provided for manually washing, rinsing, and SANITIZING EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/20/2022
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023
